findings.message: Mutation input 'description' is accepted but not used in the resolver implementation (line 40 calls repository.create_item with only 'name'). This creates a broken API contract where clients cannot actually provide a description.
findings.suggestion: Either remove the 'description' parameter from the mutation signature, or pass it to the repository layer and persist it. If the Item model needs a description field, add it to the database schema first, then update the repository function to accept and store it.
